title: Percentages
description: Master percentage calculations, conversions, and applications in placement tests.

exercises.test: Convert 3/4 to percentage. Show your work.
In a class of 50 students, 60% are girls. How many boys?
exercises.concept: If X% are one group, remainder = (100 - X)%

exercises.test: A shirt costs 800 and price increases to 1000. Find percentage increase.
A number increases by 25% to become 150. Find the original.
